mapper.insert: insert into admin_notice( title, content, notice_type, status, sort, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) values (#{dto.title}, #{dto.content}, #{dto.noticeType}, #{dto.status}, #{dto.sort}, #{adminId}, #{adminId}, now(), now(), 0)
mapper.select: select count(*) from admin_notice where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update admin_notice
title = #{dto.title},
content = #{dto.content},
notice_type = #{dto.noticeType},
status = #{dto.status},
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

update admin_notice
status = #{status}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = now()
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update admin_notice set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
